caption: A screen recording displays a terminal window open within a software environment. The terminal is filled with lines of command-line output, primarily featuring logs related to "mgr'tail routine" and "shutterstock_pathver/ringdag.log". Recurring text includes "kubectl create -f fluent-bit-ds-configmap.yaml" and "kubectl create -f fluent-bit-ds-nodeSelector.yaml", interspersed with timestamped log entries such as "Oct 28 00:22:23". The interface shows a top menu bar with "Activities" and "Terminal" options, and a system clock indicating "Oct 28 00:22". A small cursor is visible in the lower-left area of the window. Across the sequence, the content of the terminal remains static, with no new text appearing or scrolling, and the window remains in a fixed position on the screen, indicating a frozen or paused state of the terminal session.
